use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF FUNGAL INFECTIONS, INCLUDING BLASTOMYCOSIS, HISTOPLASMOSIS, AND ASPERGILLOSIS

indications.text:
TOLSURA is indicated for the treatment of the following fungal infections in
immunocompromised and non-immunocompromised adult patients:
Blastomycosis, pulmonary and extrapulmonary
